templates.title: Retail Analytics Lab
templates.description: Продажи, категории, регионы и рейтинг клиентов для семинаров по SELECT, JOIN, CTE и оконным функциям.

datasets.label: Dataset A
datasets.description: Опорный набор с paid/cancelled заказами и разнотипными категориями.
datasets.initSql:
CREATE TABLE regions (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  name TEXT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE customers (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  full_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  cohort TEXT NOT NULL,
  region_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (region_id) REFERENCES regions(id)
);

CREATE TABLE products (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  category TEXT NOT NULL,
  base_price REAL NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE orders (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  customer_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  ordered_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES customers(id)
);

CREATE TABLE order_items (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  order_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  product_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  quantity INTEGER NOT NULL,
  unit_price REAL NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES orders(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES products(id)
);

CREATE TABLE order_status_audit (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  order_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  old_status TEXT NOT NULL,
  new_status TEXT NOT NULL
);

INSERT INTO regions VALUES
  (1, 'North'),
  (2, 'South'),
  (3, 'West');

INSERT INTO customers VALUES
  (1, 'Amina Petrova', 'A-01', 1),
  (2, 'Lev Smirnov', 'A-01', 2),
  (3, 'Daria Ivanova', 'A-02', 3),
  (4, 'Ilya Sokolov', 'A-02', 1),
  (5, 'Mila Orlova', 'A-03', 2);

INSERT INTO products VALUES
  (1, 'Notebook', 'Office', 40),
  (2, 'Chair', 'Furniture', 110),
  (3, 'Desk Lamp', 'Office', 60),
  (4, 'Monitor', 'Electronics', 180),
  (5, 'Standing Desk', 'Furniture', 320);

INSERT INTO orders VALUES
  (101, 1, '2026-03-01', 'paid'),
  (102, 1, '2026-03-03', 'cancelled'),
  (103, 2, '2026-03-04', 'paid'),
  (104, 3, '2026-03-05', 'paid'),
  (105, 4, '2026-03-07', 'paid'),
  (106, 5, '2026-03-08', 'paid');

INSERT INTO order_items VALUES
  (1, 101, 1, 2, 40),
  (2, 101, 3, 1, 60),
  (3, 102, 2, 1, 110),
  (4, 103, 2, 1, 110),
  (5, 103, 4, 1, 180),
  (6, 104, 1, 1, 40),
  (7, 104, 3, 2, 55),
  (8, 105, 5, 1, 320),
  (9, 106, 1, 1, 40),
  (10, 106, 2, 1, 105);

templates.title: Academy Progress Lab
templates.description: Шаблон для свободной практики по рейтингам, средним баллам и анализу попыток.

datasets.label: Dataset A
datasets.initSql:

  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  title TEXT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE students (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  full_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  cohort_id INTEGER NOT NULL,

);

CREATE TABLE modules (

seminars.title: SQL Seminar: Multi-dataset Validation
seminars.description: Семинарный режим с живым рейтингом, скрытыми тестами и мгновенной обратной связью по результату запроса.

seminars.title: SQL Seminar: Window Functions Sprint
seminars.description: Запланированный семинар по оконным функциям и аналитическим витринам.

seminars.title: SQL Seminar: Join Foundations
seminars.description: Архивный семинар с сохранённой статистикой и логами.

tasks.title: Выручка по клиентам
tasks.description: Верните `full_name` и `paid_revenue` для клиентов, у которых суммарная выручка по оплаченным заказам не меньше 120. Сортировка: `paid_revenue DESC`, затем `full_name ASC`.
tasks.starterSql:
SELECT
  c.full_name,
  SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS paid_revenue
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.id, c.full_name
HAVING SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) >= 120
ORDER BY paid_revenue DESC, c.full_name ASC;
tasks.expectedQuery:
SELECT
  c.full_name,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS paid_revenue
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.id, c.full_name
HAVING SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) >= 120
ORDER BY paid_revenue DESC, c.full_name ASC;
hints: HAVING должен отфильтровать клиентов по порогу выручки.

tasks.title: Категории с помощью CTE
tasks.description: С помощью CTE соберите оплаченные строки заказов и верните `category`, `total_orders`, `total_revenue` для категорий с выручкой не меньше 150. Сортировка по выручке убыв., затем по названию категории.
tasks.starterSql:
WITH paid_lines AS (
  SELECT
    p.category,
    o.id AS order_id,
    oi.quantity * oi.unit_price AS line_revenue
  FROM orders o
  JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
  JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id
  WHERE o.status = 'paid'
)
SELECT
  category,
  COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS total_orders,
  ROUND(SUM(line_revenue), 2) AS total_revenue
FROM paid_lines
GROUP BY category
HAVING SUM(line_revenue) >= 150
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, category ASC;
tasks.expectedQuery:
WITH paid_lines AS (
  SELECT
    p.category,
    o.id AS order_id,
    oi.quantity * oi.unit_price AS line_revenue
  FROM orders o
  JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
  JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id
  WHERE o.status = 'paid'
)
SELECT
  category,
  COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS total_orders,
  ROUND(SUM(line_revenue), 2) AS total_revenue
FROM paid_lines
GROUP BY category
HAVING SUM(line_revenue) >= 150
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, category ASC;
hints: В CTE удобно подготовить строки выручки.
Проверьте фильтр HAVING на двух датасетах.

tasks.title: Рейтинг регионов
tasks.description: Постройте рейтинг регионов по оплаченной выручке. Верните `region_name`, `paid_revenue`, `revenue_rank`. Используйте `DENSE_RANK()` и отсортируйте по рангу, затем по имени региона.
tasks.starterSql:
WITH region_revenue AS (
  SELECT
    r.name AS region_name,
    SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS paid_revenue
  FROM regions r
  JOIN customers c ON c.region_id = r.id
  JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id
  JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
  WHERE o.status = 'paid'
  GROUP BY r.id, r.name
)
SELECT
  region_name,
  ROUND(paid_revenue, 2) AS paid_revenue,
  DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY paid_revenue DESC) AS revenue_rank
FROM region_revenue
ORDER BY revenue_rank ASC, region_name ASC;
tasks.expectedQuery:
WITH region_revenue AS (
  SELECT
    r.name AS region_name,
    SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS paid_revenue
  FROM regions r
  JOIN customers c ON c.region_id = r.id
  JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id
  JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
  WHERE o.status = 'paid'
  GROUP BY r.id, r.name
)
SELECT
  region_name,
  ROUND(paid_revenue, 2) AS paid_revenue,
  DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY paid_revenue DESC) AS revenue_rank
FROM region_revenue
ORDER BY revenue_rank ASC, region_name ASC;
hints: Окно должно ранжировать именно агрегированный результат.
Ранги одинаковой выручки не должны иметь пропусков.

playgroundChallenges.title: Средний балл по когортам
playgroundChallenges.description: Верните `cohort_title` и `avg_score` для когорт, у которых средний балл по всем попыткам больше 80. Сортировка по `avg_score DESC`.
playgroundChallenges.starterSql:
SELECT
  c.title AS cohort_title,
  ROUND(AVG(a.score), 2) AS avg_score
FROM cohorts c
JOIN students s ON s.cohort_id = c.id
JOIN attempts a ON a.student_id = s.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.title
HAVING AVG(a.score) > 80
ORDER BY avg_score DESC;
playgroundChallenges.expectedQuery:
SELECT
  c.title AS cohort_title,
  ROUND(AVG(a.score), 2) AS avg_score
FROM cohorts c
JOIN students s ON s.cohort_id = c.id
JOIN attempts a ON a.student_id = s.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.title
HAVING AVG(a.score) > 80
ORDER BY avg_score DESC;

playgroundChallenges.title: Топ клиентов по выручке
playgroundChallenges.description: Покажите 3 лучших клиентов по оплаченной выручке: `full_name`, `paid_revenue`.
playgroundChallenges.starterSql:
SELECT
  c.full_name,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS paid_revenue
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.id, c.full_name
ORDER BY paid_revenue DESC, c.full_name ASC
LIMIT 3;
playgroundChallenges.expectedQuery:
SELECT
  c.full_name,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS paid_revenue
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.id, c.full_name
ORDER BY paid_revenue DESC, c.full_name ASC
LIMIT 3;

playgroundChallenges.title: Рейтинг студентов внутри когорты
playgroundChallenges.description: Рассчитайте средний балл студента и ранг внутри когорты. Верните `cohort_title`, `full_name`, `avg_score`, `cohort_rank`.
playgroundChallenges.starterSql:
WITH student_avg AS (
  SELECT
    c.title AS cohort_title,
    s.full_name,
    AVG(a.score) AS avg_score
  FROM students s
  JOIN cohorts c ON c.id = s.cohort_id
  JOIN attempts a ON a.student_id = s.id
  GROUP BY c.id, c.title, s.id, s.full_name
)
SELECT
  cohort_title,
  full_name,
  ROUND(avg_score, 2) AS avg_score,
  DENSE_RANK() OVER (
    PARTITION BY cohort_title
    ORDER BY avg_score DESC
  ) AS cohort_rank
FROM student_avg
ORDER BY cohort_title ASC, cohort_rank ASC, full_name ASC;
playgroundChallenges.expectedQuery:
WITH student_avg AS (
  SELECT
    c.title AS cohort_title,
    s.full_name,
    AVG(a.score) AS avg_score
  FROM students s
  JOIN cohorts c ON c.id = s.cohort_id
  JOIN attempts a ON a.student_id = s.id
  GROUP BY c.id, c.title, s.id, s.full_name
)
SELECT
  cohort_title,
  full_name,
  ROUND(avg_score, 2) AS avg_score,
  DENSE_RANK() OVER (
    PARTITION BY cohort_title
    ORDER BY avg_score DESC
  ) AS cohort_rank
FROM student_avg
ORDER BY cohort_title ASC, cohort_rank ASC, full_name ASC;

playgroundChallenges.title: Создать VIEW для оплаченных заказов
playgroundChallenges.description: Создайте `VIEW paid_order_revenue_view` с колонками `order_id`, `customer_name`, `paid_revenue` для оплаченных заказов. Проверка смотрит объект и сравнивает содержимое view.
playgroundChallenges.starterSql:
CREATE VIEW paid_order_revenue_view AS
SELECT
  o.id AS order_id,
  c.full_name AS customer_name,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS paid_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON c.id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY o.id, c.full_name;
playgroundChallenges.expectedQuery:
SELECT
  o.id AS order_id,
  c.full_name AS customer_name,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS paid_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON c.id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY o.id, c.full_name
ORDER BY order_id ASC;

ddl.verificationQuery: SELECT * FROM paid_order_revenue_view ORDER BY order_id ASC;
ddl.verificationExpectedQuery:
SELECT
  o.id AS order_id,
  c.full_name AS customer_name,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS paid_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON c.id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY o.id, c.full_name
ORDER BY order_id ASC;

playgroundChallenges.title: Создать TRIGGER аудита статусов
playgroundChallenges.description: Создайте `TRIGGER trg_orders_status_audit`, который после изменения `orders.status` пишет строку в `order_status_audit(order_id, old_status, new_status)`.
playgroundChallenges.starterSql:
CREATE TRIGGER trg_orders_status_audit
AFTER UPDATE OF status ON orders
FOR EACH ROW
WHEN OLD.status <> NEW.status
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO order_status_audit(order_id, old_status, new_status)
  VALUES (OLD.id, OLD.status, NEW.status);
END;

simulationSql: UPDATE orders SET status = 'archived' WHERE id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM orders);
ddl.verificationQuery: SELECT order_id, old_status, new_status FROM order_status_audit ORDER BY order_id ASC;
ddl.verificationExpectedQuery:
SELECT MIN(id) AS order_id, 'paid' AS old_status, 'archived' AS new_status
FROM orders;

playgroundChallenges.title: Индекс и EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN
playgroundChallenges.description: Создайте индекс `idx_orders_customer_status` по `(customer_id, status)` и добейтесь, чтобы план поиска по клиенту и статусу использовал индекс.
playgroundChallenges.starterSql:
CREATE INDEX idx_orders_customer_status
ON orders(customer_id, status);
playgroundChallenges.expectedQuery: EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN SELECT * FROM orders WHERE customer_id = 1 AND status = 'paid';

explain.targetSql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE customer_id = 1 AND status = 'paid'
